summary: Iteration 5 testing complete. Backend pytest 68/68 PASS — 50 regression tests still green plus 18 new tests covering the contribution module: register-as-contributor role assignment, plain-user 403 on POST /api/contributions, contributor pending vs admin auto-approved status, /contributions/mine with embedded poi, admin-only listing with status filter (400 for unknown status), admin-only PATCH moderate (approve/reject flow), public /api/pois/{id}/contributions returning ONLY approved entries, owner-can-delete-pending vs cannot-delete-approved (admin can), unknown-poi 404 and invalid-type 422. Frontend verified end-to-end: Landing shows 'Walk Brera virtually →' CTA + 'Become a contributor' section; /register?role=contributor pre-checks contributor checkbox and creates a user with role='contributor' via real API; /contribute page exposes all data-testids (contribution-form, contribution-poi-select, contribution-type-{narrative|dialogue_prompt|fun_fact|photo_url}, contribution-title, contribution-content, contribution-submit) plus bottom-nav with nav-contribute / nav-profile / nav-listen / nav-discoveries; POST /api/contributions from contributor session returns status='pending' and shows up in /contributions/mine; plain user navigating to /contribute sees the 'Become a contributor' upgrade CTA; admin /admin/contributions shows Pending/Approved/Rejected tabs with Approve/Reject buttons and the click moves the entry; after admin approval the contribution appears in public /api/pois/{id}/contributions feed (POIDrawer integration confirmed at API level). ListenPage Virtual walk replaces Ghost-walk: clicking the toggle reveals the three-mode panel with Auto-walk / Step forward / Drag pin labels and Auto-walk advances automatically (drawer auto-opens at Cortile della Pinacoteca during the run).
action_items: (Minor / housekeeping) test_contributor_creates_pending returns the contribution id — pytest emitted PytestReturnNotNoneWarning. Replace 'return body["id"]' with a local variable to silence the warning.
(Carry-over from iter 4) Disambiguate duplicate data-testid 'profile-profession-other' (chip vs free-text input) — rename input to 'profile-profession-other-input'.
(Carry-over from iter 3) Split /app/backend/server.py (>1200 lines) into routers/auth.py, routers/pois.py, routers/me.py, routers/contributions.py, routers/admin.py, seeds.py.
critical_code_review_comments: Contribution endpoints are clean: POST checks role via helper _is_contributor_or_admin and verifies POI exists before insert; admin-created docs are auto-approved while contributor docs start 'pending' — verified by tests.
Public endpoint GET /api/pois/{poi_id}/contributions correctly filters by status='approved' so unmoderated entries cannot leak.
DELETE /api/contributions/{id} grants delete to admin OR (owner AND status=='pending') — verified plain-owner cannot delete approved.
Mongo indexes added on (poi_id,status), (user_id,created_at) and unique 'id' — good for the moderation list and /mine listings.
Pydantic Literal types on ContributionIn.type and ContributionModerateIn.status correctly emit 422 for invalid values without leaking server internals.
_serialize_contribution explicitly omits MongoDB _id — verified no leak in public/admin/mine responses.
test_credentials: admin@brera.app / BreraAdmin2026! verified. Fresh TEST_contrib_<uuid>@example.com / Sekret123! contributors registered via API and via /register?role=contributor UI; plain TEST_plain_<uuid>@example.com users registered with as_contributor=false and confirmed they receive a 403 on POST /api/contributions and see the upgrade CTA on /contribute.
seed_data_creation: Several TEST_contrib_* and TEST_plain_* users plus ~12 ephemeral contributions (mix of pending/approved/rejected/deleted). The owner_cannot_delete_approved test cleans up its admin-approved doc; other approved test contributions remain attached to seeded POIs but flagged with TEST content for easy cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression command: cd /app && set -a && . backend/.env && set +a && python -m pytest backend/tests/test_brera_backend.py -v. Contribution form testids: contribution-page, contribution-form, contribution-poi-select, contribution-type-{narrative|dialogue_prompt|fun_fact|photo_url}, contribution-title, contribution-content, contribution-submit. BottomNav testids: bottom-nav, nav-listen, nav-discoveries, nav-contribute (only for contributor/admin), nav-profile. The /listen page first-render for a brand-new contributor will show the language onboarding step and BottomNav is hidden during onboarding — to test BottomNav visibility for a contributor either complete onboarding via PATCH /api/me/profile {onboarded:true} or navigate to /contribute directly. ListenPage Virtual walk reveals three buttons (Auto-walk / Step forward / Drag pin) on click.
